item.title: Mapping adaptive immune responses toward fungal antigens in inflammatory bowel disease using T cell repertoire sequencing and phage-immunoprecipitation sequencing.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - Immune reactivity to the gut mycobiome has been implicated in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), particularly Crohn's disease (CD), but the systemic adaptive immune repertoire targeting the gut myco...
